name: FRAT BOYS | Ian MacDowall, Todd Fukuhara, John “JJ” Jaroszyński, Constantinos Dimitrakopoulos
description:
(MLM)
FRAT BOYS | 👬

As Ayesha Erotica once wisely said: “Fratboys, let’s have a gangbang”.
You attend a nice college far away from home. You’ve heard of the fraternities in college, and thought that it can help cope with the loneliness at this place.
After the painstakingly long and wacky process of the rushes, your bid has been chosen and accepted into “Sigma Psi Gamma”. Only thing remaining is to accept the pledge, which the head of the frat: Ian, inviting you in, during a big house party with all of the brothers attending…
You meet Ian and his equally boisterous, beer-reeking, himbo, (and all secretly closeted) buddies, who are excited to accept you into their frat.
What could possibly go wrong here?
 
FOUR BIG GUYS, AND THEY GRAB ON MY THIGHS.
creator: QueenOfConeyIsland
